category_sources: Official GitHub README says mairix indexes and searches messages in Maildir, MH, MMDF, or mbox folders.
source_facts.description says "Email index and search tool".
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use mairix.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the project’s main website and describes behavior, usage context, and support channels.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/vandry/mairix, so repo was intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says it indexes and searches Maildir, MH, MMDF, and mbox folders.
source_facts.description identifies email indexing and search.
